name: Chocolate-Dipped Strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate pieces at the top of a double boiler.
2. Once melted, add the butter and vanilla, stirring until well combined.
3. Dip the strawberries into the chocolate mixture, swirling to ensure even coating.
4. Place the dipped strawberries on waxed paper.
5. Set in a cool, dry place to allow the chocolate to set.
